mapper.select: select count(1) as total_jobs, sum(case when status = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as active_jobs, sum(case when status = 1 and salary_min is not null and salary_max is not null then 1 else 0 end) as salary_ready_jobs, sum(case when status = 1 and job_description is not null and trim(job_description) != '' then 1 else 0 end) as description_ready_jobs, sum(case when status = 1 and city is not null and trim(city) != '' then 1 else 0 end) as city_ready_jobs, count(distinct case when status = 1 then company_name end) as company_count, count(distinct case when status = 1 then city end) as city_count, count(distinct data_batch_no) as batch_count, date_format(min(publish_time), '%Y-%m-%d') as min_publish_time, date_format(max(publish_time), '%Y-%m-%d') as max_publish_time, round(avg(case when status = 1 and salary_min is not null and salary_max is not null then (salary_min + salary_max) / 2 else null end), 0) as avg_salary from job_info
select city as name, count(1) as value from job_info where status = 1 and city is not null and trim(city) != '' group by city order by value desc

select round(avg(salary), 0) from ( select salary, row_number() over (order by salary) as rn, count(1) over () as cnt from ( select (salary_min + salary_max) / 2 as salary from job_info where status = 1 and salary_min is not null and salary_max is not null ) salary_source ) ranked where rn in (floor((cnt + 1) / 2), floor((cnt + 2) / 2))

select name, count(1) as value from ( select case when salary_min is null or salary_max is null then '未知' when (salary_min + salary_max) / 2 < 3000 then '3K以下' when (salary_min + salary_max) / 2 < 5000 then '3K-5K' when (salary_min + salary_max) / 2 < 8000 then '5K-8K' when (salary_min + salary_max) / 2 < 12000 then '8K-12K' when (salary_min + salary_max) / 2 < 15000 then '12K-15K' else '15K以上' end as name from job_info where status = 1 ) t group by name order by field(name, '3K以下', '3K-5K', '5K-8K', '8K-12K', '12K-15K', '15K以上', '未知')

select city, round(min(salary), 0) as min_salary, round(max(case when rn = greatest(1, ceil(cnt * 0.25)) then salary end), 0) as q1, round(max(case when rn = greatest(1, ceil(cnt * 0.50)) then salary end), 0) as median, round(max(case when rn = greatest(1, ceil(cnt * 0.75)) then salary end), 0) as q3, round(max(salary), 0) as max_salary from ( select city, salary, row_number() over (partition by city order by salary) as rn, count(1) over (partition by city) as cnt from ( select city, (salary_min + salary_max) / 2 as salary from job_info where status = 1 and city is not null and trim(city) != '' and salary_min is not null and salary_max is not null ) salary_source ) ranked group by city order by median desc

select coalesce(nullif(education_text, ''), '未知') as x, coalesce(nullif(experience_text, ''), '未知') as y, count(1) as value from job_info where status = 1 group by coalesce(nullif(education_text, ''), '未知'), coalesce(nullif(experience_text, ''), '未知')

select name, count(1) as value, round(avg(avg_salary), 0) as avg_salary from ( select case when concat(job_title, ' ', job_description) regexp 'Java|前端|后端|开发|程序|软件|Python|测试|运维|算法|数据|IT|Web|Vue|PHP|Android|安卓' then '技术开发' when concat(job_title, ' ', job_description) regexp '销售|客服|客户|电销|业务|导购|顾问' then '销售客服' when concat(job_title, ' ', job_description) regexp '行政|人事|招聘|文员|助理|前台' then '行政人事' when concat(job_title, ' ', job_description) regexp '财务|会计|出纳|审计|税务' then '财务会计' when concat(job_title, ' ', job_description) regexp '教师|老师|培训|课程|教务|教育' then '教育培训' when concat(job_title, ' ', job_description) regexp '护士|护理|医生|药|康复|医疗|口腔' then '医疗护理' when concat(job_title, ' ', job_description) regexp '普工|操作工|生产|质检|维修|电工|焊工|技工|工厂' then '生产制造' when concat(job_title, ' ', job_description) regexp '司机|配送|仓库|物流|快递|搬运' then '物流配送' when concat(job_title, ' ', job_description) regexp '设计|运营|主播|剪辑|新媒体|美工|策划' then '设计运营' else '其他' end as name, case when salary_min is not null and salary_max is not null then (salary_min + salary_max) / 2 else null end as avg_salary from job_info where status = 1 ) t group by name order by value desc
